message:
feat(lint): implement quality and performance validation rules

Add 6 new validation rules for content quality and performance:

Quality rules:
- MeaningfulDescriptionRule: check description length and quality
- ActionableRulesRule: verify rules start with action verbs
- ExamplesHaveCodeRule: ensure example sections contain code
- BalancedContentRule: check prose/code ratio

Performance rules:
- TokenBudgetRule: estimate token usage and warn on large skills
- EmbeddingQualityRule: check content suitability for search

This unblocks meta_skill-y1ug (ms lint CLI command).

Closes: meta_skill-niok

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
